channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 25th April
item.description:
Trolley left outside Blythwood park, Blyth Road BR1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slab and risk of tripping, 25th April
item.description:
Broken paving slab with risk of tripping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olney Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a dead fox behind the bushes of this bus stop, 25th April
item.description:
The foxes head is sticking out of the bushes and now there are lots of flies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catlin Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root raising the pavement., 25th April
item.description:
This is a trip hazard, and an obstruction for buggies/mobility aids. I fell over this today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Ridge, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by park entrance, 25th April
item.description:
Large bag of Flytipping at the entrance to Hoblingwell Wood carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement parking reg EA66 AZF, 25th April
item.description:
Pavement parking reg EA66 AZF Blocking tactile pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded clothing on pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Has been there for a long time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersby Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mess on tarmace in Excalbur Drive about 20 - 30 yards from western end of Hector Crescent, 25th April
item.description:
I don't know what this mess is, but I don't want to step on it. It has been there for many months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Excalibur Drive, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped at bin by bus stop, 25th April
item.description:
House hold rubbish dumped and being spread across the pavement by foxes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Door abandoned blocking access to car, 25th April
item.description:
A door abandoned on the street blocking access to car

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grand Union Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, again 😕, 25th April
item.description:
You just cleared this, but people are treating this corner as a place to dump stuff repeatedly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Dagmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges need cutting, 25th April
item.description:
The grass verges need cutting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Brackley Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken slide, 25th April
item.description:
Someone has broken the slide in the playground. It now has a huge crack in it and isn’t safe for children to use. It either needs repair or replacing as is no longer fit for purpose.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Timothy's Mews, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped tv, 25th April
item.description:
Hi I noticed that next to the front door for block for 21-30 Hayes grove there is a dumped flat screen tv which has been there for 6m now at least. Please could you remove it? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22-30, Hayes Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th April
item.description:
Dead fox found in bushes. Have carefully put it in a blue bag and tucked it here, easily visible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Bornes, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway entrance, 25th April
item.description:
People urinating day/night at the entrance of the alleyway on Lancell Street N16 0NU. Odour is travelling into my property especially on hotter days! Can these alleyways be disinfected?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancell Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Here we go again, 25th April
item.description:
Are you as bored as me?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog, 25th April
item.description:
Dog

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th April
item.description:
Overflowing with litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Fridge freezer, 25th April
item.description:
A fridge freezer has been dumped outside my house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
